title: Implement source semantic search policy, reindex and deletion rules
requirements: Enable LanceDB indexing and retrieval for source_data in explicit source modes.
Do not add a new external search API and do not use cloud embeddings.
Index all sensitivity levels unless a secret is detected.
If a secret is detected, stop indexing that document, delete any previous FTS/vector rows, create secret_blocked blocker issue for admin review, and continue with the next document.
If PII or similar sensitive data is detected without a secret, index the document and create an admin audit issue without storing raw PII in issue metadata.
Use document-level vectors temporarily and record this limitation in trace/docs.
Reindex only changed documents unless --force is passed; changes include content_hash, parser version, embedding version, ACL/scope fingerprint, sensitivity, trust status and index profile.
On file deletion or source object removal, mark MemorySearchDocument deleted and delete FTS/LanceDB rows by document_id.
On ACL or sensitivity changes, refresh vector payload through delete+upsert by document_id.
